title: Code Readability Analyzer
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Python script that takes a Python function as input and outputs a report on the function's readability, including metrics such as the Halstead complexity measure, the McCabe cyclomatic complexity, and the number of comments.
constraints: Must be written in Python 3.x syntax
Must compute the Halstead complexity measure

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid
The generated code should adhere to the specified constraints (Python 3.x syntax and computes the Halstead complexity measure)
The generated code should correctly analyze the input function's readability and output the specified metrics
